title: Workflow
description: A workflow combining specs, gates, and reviews into a development pipeline.

Criterion.description:
A single acceptance criterion attached to a spec.

Each criterion has a name, description, and an optional shell command
that can verify it programmatically. When `cmd` is `None`, the criterion
is evaluated manually (or in future phases, via an agent `prompt` field).

cmd.description:
Optional shell command to verify this criterion.
Omitted from serialized output when `None`.

description.description: Detailed description of what this criterion checks.

Gate.description: A quality gate that must pass before work proceeds.

Spec.description: A specification that defines what should be built and its acceptance criteria.

criteria.description: Acceptance criteria that must be satisfied.

description.description:
Human-readable description. Defaults to empty string, omitted from
serialized output when empty.

name.description: Display name for this spec (required, must be unique across all specs).
